hints: Inside an f-string, put the format spec after a colon: f"{name:<22}" left-aligns name in a 22-character field. f"{price:>8.2f}" right-aligns price in 8 characters with 2 decimal places.
Both columns go in the same f-string on one line: f"{name:<22}{price:>8.2f}". The field widths (22 + 8 = 30) should match your separator length.
For the separator, use "-" * 30 — that's the string "-" repeated 30 times. Don't count and type 30 dashes by hand.
The total must be computed: total = coffee + avocado_toast + orange_juice. Then use the same f-string format for the total line as for the item lines.
